Klasse GUI

java.lang.Object
view.GUI
Alle implementierten Schnittstellen:
Observer
public class GUI extends Object implements Observer
This class represents the main GUI of the game. It initializes the main window, menu bar, and different screens and uses the GUIBoard class to display the game board.

  • Konstruktordetails

    • GUI

      public GUI()
      Initializes the GUI. Creates the window, main panel and all different screens.

  • Methodendetails

    • getInstance

      public static GUI getInstance()
      Creates a new Instance of this Manager, if there is none already.
      Gibt zurück:
      Instance if one already existed, creates a new one otherwise.

    • updateTimer

      public void updateTimer(int timeLeft)
      Updates the text displaying the remaining time to perform a move.
      Parameter:
      timeLeft - The value that should get displayed.

    • updateStatus

      public void updateStatus(String text, Color color)
      Updates the text displaying the current game status.
      Parameter:
      text - The text that should get displayed.
      color - The color of the text.

    • showGameOverMsg

      public void showGameOverMsg(PlayerEntity winner)
      Displays a dialog with the game over message, winner and loser information.
      Parameter:
      winner - The player who won the game.

    • update

      public void update()
      This method gets called, whenever the board gets updated (by its observable). Repaints the GUI.
      Angegeben von:
      update in Schnittstelle Observer

    • reset

      public void reset()
      Resets the game state and the GUI components to their initial state. This method is called when a new game starts or when the user wants to reset the current game.
      Löst aus:
      IllegalStateException - if the GUIBoard cannot be found in the current board panel.

    • findGuiBoardIn

      private GUIBoard findGuiBoardIn(Container container)

    • main

      public static void main(String[] args)
